info.title: Amsal ERP API
info.description: Backend API for authentication, production settings, production batches, and leftover-aware costing.

get.summary: Return top-level KPI cards across production, supply, distribution, sales, and stock
Return trend series for production, supply, distribution, and retail over the last N days
Return low-stock alerts, outstanding balances, and finished-goods warning data
Return recent activity feed from supply, production, distribution, and sales
List distributors
Fetch one distributor
List distributor orders

post.summary: Create a distributor order and optionally collect an initial payment

get.summary: Fetch one distributor order with payments

post.summary: Add a payment to a distributor order

get.summary: Distributor sales and outstanding balance summary
Show finished bottle stock available for distribution and retail sale
List retail sales

post.summary: Create a retail sale and optionally collect an initial payment

get.summary: Fetch one retail sale with payments

post.summary: Add a payment to a retail sale

get.summary: Retail sales summary

post.summary: Create an admin or staff account for development and seeding workflows
Authenticate a user and issue a bearer token

get.summary: List production parameters

get.summary: Fetch one production parameter
List production batches

get.summary: Fetch one production batch with computed line items

get.summary: List active leftover layers that will feed the next production run
List supply receipts
